name: Suspicious Execution with Colorcpl
notes:
This rule detects suspicious execution of colorcpl.exe.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Creation with Colorcpl
SIGMA Description: Once executed, colorcpl.exe will copy the arbitrary file to c:\windows\system32\spool\drivers\color\


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of colorcpl.exe
when the event matches ( LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.icm' OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.gmmp' OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.cdmp' OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.camp' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Execution with Colorcpl on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of colorcpl.exe
AND NOT when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.icm' 	OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.gmmp' 	OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.cdmp' 	OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.camp' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Execution with Colorcpl
Event description: Detects suspicious execution of colorcpl.exe.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
